---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
install.packages(c("tidyverse", "quantmod", "lubridate", "zoo", "scales"))

library(tidyverse)
library(quantmod)
library(lubridate)
library(zoo)
library(scales)
  
```

```{r}
start_date <- as.Date("2015-01-01")
end_date   <- as.Date("2025-12-31")

getSymbols(c("ECBDFR", "ECBMRRFR"), src = "FRED", from = start_date, to = end_date)
```

```{r}
ecb_rates <- merge(ECBDFR, ECBMRRFR) %>%
  fortify.zoo() %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  rename(
    date = Index,
    deposit_rate = ECBDFR,
    mro_rate = ECBMRRFR
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    month = floor_date(date, "month")
  ) %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(
    deposit_rate = last(na.omit(deposit_rate)),
    mro_rate = last(na.omit(mro_rate)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(date = month) %>%
  filter(date >= start_date, date <= end_date)
```

```{r}
ecb_rates_long <- ecb_rates %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(deposit_rate, mro_rate),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "rate"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    variable = recode(
      variable,
      deposit_rate = "Tipo de depósito",
      mro_rate = "Tipo principal de refinanciación"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(ecb_rates_long, aes(x = date, y = rate, color = variable)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date("2022-07-01"), linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  labs(
    title = "Evolución de los tipos oficiales del BCE",
    subtitle = "Tipo de depósito y tipo principal de refinanciación, 2015-2025",
    x = "Fecha",
    y = "Tipo de interés (%)",
    color = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```
